results.rendered_html:
unmada a.
1 Intoxicated, drunk; udīrayāmāsurivonmadānām  R. 2. 9 , 16. 54. 
2 Mad, furious, extravagant;  Śi. 10. 4 , 12. 44 , 77 ; 16. 59. 
3 Causing intoxication, intoxicating; madhukarāṃganayā muhurunmadadhvanibhṛtā nibhṛtākṣaramujjage  Śi. 6. 20. 
— daḥ
1 Insanity.
2 Intoxication, ecstacy.
